stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 File Standard Masses table.
A twin-engined turboprop fitted with 82 passenger seats is planned for a scheduled domestic Commercial Air Transport flight with a sport team of 32 sportsmen and 38 standard passengers (22 males and 16 females) on board. Given the following information and assuming that the Operator uses regulatory masses for the standard passengers (all adult) and checked baggage, what is the actual Traffic Load of this flight?

Average estimated mass of the sport team: 105 kg per person.
Total passenger baggage on board: 64 pieces.
